app.name: Sanadat
app.description: Saudi platform to digitize receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices for small businesses.
app.commergioAttribution: A system by Commergio for Technology and Business Development

hero.badge: Trusted Saudi platform for small businesses
hero.subtitle: A trusted Saudi platform to digitize vouchers and non-tax invoices — simple, secure, and ready for future Ministry of Commerce compliance. Annual plan SAR 399.

floatingDocs.label: Our vision
floatingDocs.title: Your documents — trusted and professional
floatingDocs.subtitle: Receipts, payments, and non-tax invoices — organized, verified, and ready for growth
floatingDocs.quote1: From paper to digital — your business future starts here
floatingDocs.quote1Hint: Leave messy paper vouchers behind and move to a verified digital system in minutes
floatingDocs.quote2: Professional A4 invoices — print-ready and shareable
floatingDocs.quote2Hint: Consistent branding with logo, signature, and stamp on every document
floatingDocs.quote3: Receipt and payment vouchers with secure sequential numbering
floatingDocs.quote3Hint: Every document has a unique ID and audit trail — full financial transparency
floatingDocs.quote4: Future-ready for Ministry of Commerce compliance
floatingDocs.quote4Hint: A Saudi platform that grows with you — toward easier compliance and faster growth

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your business needs
features.subtitle: A simple, powerful system focused on the documents small businesses use every day

types.title: Three document types
types.description: Receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices — all in one platform with official design.

numbering.title: Secure sequential numbering
numbering.description: Unique document numbers that are never reused. Documents cannot be edited after creation.

legal.title: Legal reliability
legal.description: Government-ready print layout with signature, stamp areas, and QR placeholder for future compliance.

export.title: PDF export & print
export.description: Professional A4 documents with RTL/LTR support, print, and WhatsApp sharing.

responsive.title: Fully responsive
responsive.description: Works smoothly on mobile and desktop — built for the Saudi market.

scale.title: Ready to scale
scale.description: Architecture ready for payment gateways and Ministry of Commerce integrations.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps — from document to client
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple workflow built for owners — no accounting complexity

1.title: Create document
1.description: Receipt voucher, payment voucher, or invoice — auto-numbered with your official company details.

2.title: Generate PDF
2.description: Print-ready A4 output — professional Arabic/English layout for archiving.

3.title: Share via WhatsApp
3.description: Send to clients or accountants instantly — with an immutable audit trail.

showcase.label: Document preview
showcase.title: Official print-ready documents
showcase.subtitle: Professional A4 layout — suitable for printing and official archiving

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One plan — simple & transparent
pricing.subtitle: No complexity — all features included
pricing.gateways: Supported via Moyasar · HyperPay · STC Pay
pricing.savingsHint: vs SAR 49/month — one simple annual plan

1.name: Ahmed Al-Shammari
1.text: Saved us hours of paperwork. Documents look official and clients trust them — especially PDFs sent on WhatsApp.

2.name: Fatima Al-Otaibi
2.text: The best voucher system we've used for clients. Simple, fast, and sequential numbering makes audits easier.

3.name: Khalid Al-Qahtani
3.text: Invoices and receipts in one place — exactly what contractors need. Our team adopted it in one day.

edit.q: Can I edit a document after creation?
edit.a: No. Documents are immutable after creation for reliability. You can only cancel with a reason; cancelled docs remain visible.

cancel.q: What happens when I cancel a document?
cancel.a: It is marked as cancelled and stays in the log with its original number. Numbers are never reused.

tax.a: Designed for non-tax invoices and receipt/payment vouchers. ZATCA tax invoice support is planned for the future.

subscription.a: SAR 399/year with optional auto-renewal. Notifications 7, 3, and 1 days before expiry.

payments.a: Ready for Moyasar, HyperPay, and STC Pay, with Mada, Visa, and Apple Pay.

cta.title: Start digitizing your vouchers today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Saudi businesses that trust Sanadat for their financial documents

footer.about: Sanadat — a trusted Saudi platform to digitize receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices. Ready for future Ministry of Commerce compliance.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Questions about Sanadat, billing, or your account? Reach our team using the details below.
contact.supportBody: Signed-in users can open a support ticket from Dashboard → Support for faster help with documents, billing, or team access.

intro.title: Overview
intro.body: Sanadat (“we”, “our”) provides a document management platform for Saudi businesses. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

dataCollected.title: Data we collect
dataCollected.body:
Account data: name, email, phone, company name.
Business documents: receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, invoices, customer records, approval signatures.
Billing: subscription status, payment references from Moyasar (we do not store full card numbers).
Technical: IP address, browser type, and usage logs for security and support.

usage.title: How we use data
usage.body: We use your data to provide the service, issue and store documents, process subscriptions, send transactional emails (confirmation, password reset), improve security, and respond to support requests.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. We share data only with infrastructure providers required to run Sanadat (hosting, database, email, payment gateway) under appropriate agreements, or when required by Saudi law.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: We retain account and document data while your subscription is active and as needed for legal, tax, or dispute resolution purposes. You may request deletion subject to applicable retention obligations.

security.title: Security
security.body: We use encryption in transit, tenant isolation, role-based access, and signed URLs for private files such as customer signatures. Access to production systems is restricted to authorized personnel.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data by contacting us. Saudi users may exercise rights under applicable personal data protection regulations.

intro.title: Agreement
intro.body: By creating an account or using Sanadat you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

service.title: The service
service.body: Sanadat helps businesses create, number, print, and share receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices. Features may change; we will notify users of material changes when practical.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: You are responsible for accurate registration information, safeguarding credentials, and all activity under your account. Team members access data according to roles assigned by the account owner.

documents.title: Documents & approvals
documents.body: Documents created in Sanadat are intended as business records. Customer approval links and signatures are provided as a workflow aid; you remain responsible for the accuracy of document content and lawful use of customer data.

billing.title: Subscription & billing
billing.body: Paid plans are billed annually in SAR via Moyasar unless otherwise stated. Fees are non-refundable except where required by law. Failure to pay may suspend access.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You may not use Sanadat for unlawful activity, fraud, harassment, malware, or attempts to bypass security or access other tenants’ data.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: Sanadat is provided “as is” to the maximum extent permitted by law. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the platform.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these Terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via the app or email.
